allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\(''pdf-parse''\); console.log\(typeof p, Object.keys\(p\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\(''pdf-parse''\); const p = new PDFParse\(\); console.log\(typeof p.getText, typeof p.getMetadata, Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(p\)\)\)")
